The '''Battle of Bespin''' occurred some time after the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], when a group of freedom fighters under the [[Alderaanian Resistance]] attempted to prevent a shipment of [[Nazren]] slaves to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for use in the [[Sarlacc Project]].

{{Battle-stub}}
